title: navarretia viscidula subsp. viscidula
intro: Navarretia viscidula subsp. viscidula, also known as sticky clarkia, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Navarretia viscidula subsp. viscidula include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
